# HeadFade - Global Synthetic Media Infrastructure

> HeadFade is the world's first forensic deepfake detection platform — a real-time AI video authentication layer for the open web. It features an embed player, a creator marketplace, and cognitive telemetry, powered by Gemini AI.

## Features
- **Forensic Deepfake Detection**: Uses Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite to analyze videos frame-by-frame and determine if they are AI-generated or authentic.
- **Creator Marketplace**: A micro-licensing marketplace for AI creators to monetize synthetic media.
- **Embed Distribution**: Publishers embed the HeadFade player to add forensic provenance data to viral media.
- **Cognitive Telemetry**: Real-time analytics on deepfake detection rates, confidence scores, and media provenance.

## Docs

- [Embed Player Documentation](https://headfade.com/embed/demo)
